seo.title: FAS-Tech UNILIFT | Traction Hoist USA | UL 1323 Man-Riding Hoist
seo.description: FAS-Tech (FAS-Technology) UNILIFT traction hoist for the US market. UL 1323 listed, CSA Z271 certified, 1,500–2,200 lbs WLL, unlimited lift height. Request a quote.
seo.ogTitle: FAS-Tech UNILIFT | Traction Hoist USA | UL 1323 Man-Riding Hoist
seo.ogDescription: FAS-Tech UNILIFT traction hoists for the US market. UL 1323 listed, man-riding certified, unlimited lift height.
seo.twitterDescription: FAS-Tech UNILIFT traction hoists. UL 1323 listed, man-riding certified, built for the US jobsite.

productSchema.name: UNILIFT Traction Hoist Range
productSchema.description: Electric wire-rope traction hoist for man-riding and material lifting. UL 1323 listed, CSA Z271 certified, EN 1808:2015. Unlimited lift height.

contact.title: Ready to spec the UNILIFT for your project?
contact.intro: Get a custom quote, request the full technical datasheet, or discuss US distribution.
